acceptanceCriteria.summary: Finished-product list flow was aligned to the source visual cues using the local screenshot folder and source capture audit.
Closed-tab behavior reflects archive semantics with source-like heading treatment and closed-state actions.
Finished-product config and rows remain persisted through the journal-document API flow.
Core list/detail actions are meaningful; the placeholder no-op action was removed from the finished-product detail flow.
Finished-product print actions open the PDF route instead of browser print.
The app build includes the journal PDF route and the finished-product journal stays in the printable document pipeline.
Targeted ESLint, full TypeScript, and production build verification completed successfully.
Push and deploy verification are not recorded yet.
